full_text:
He Zhi 賀質
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Zhi (賀質)was born in Shanyin county, Kuaiji commandery. Grandson of He Qi. Son of He Da. Sun Hao’s Minister of the Interior. He Zhi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
